core_mechanism: learning the deterministic drift/velocity field of a continuous-time generative transport (a conditioned flow/ODE mapping an initial state to a target distribution), amortized so that sampling collapses from iterative integration into a single forward evaluation conditioned on external inputs
brief_reason: The abstract replaces multistep iterative denoising with an input-conditioned drift learned during training that transports the current observation to future outputs in a single forward pass, i.e. a distilled continuous-time transport whose flow map is evaluated once rather than integrated stepwise.
